verdict: Teaching, especially K-12, is structurally protected: the relationship with students, classroom management, in-loco-parentis responsibility, and licensure all combine to make this one of the most AI-resilient knowledge-work careers. AI changes lesson prep and grading; it doesn't change the job.
timeline_callout: AI-assisted lesson planning and tutoring tools are mainstream now; the classroom role itself is durable for decades.

routine_cognitive.reasoning: Lesson prep and grading have routine cognitive elements that AI absorbs well.

creative_judgment.reasoning: Adapting to a class on the fly requires real-time judgment AI cannot replicate.

regulatory_moat.reasoning: State teaching licensure required; districts cannot put unlicensed adults in classrooms.

embodied_work.reasoning: Physically present with children all day — not a remote-able role.

stakes_of_error.reasoning: Child safety is high-stakes; in-loco-parentis legal duty.

relationships.reasoning: The relationship IS the work — kids learn from teachers they trust.

ai_capability_gap.reasoning: AI helps with prep + grading + tutoring; cannot manage 28 nine-year-olds in a room.

key_tasks.task: Plan and deliver lessons aligned with curriculum standards
key_tasks.note: AI accelerates prep; delivery is in front of students.

key_tasks.task: Assess student progress through tests, projects, and observation
key_tasks.note: AI grades multiple choice; humans assess writing and behavior.

key_tasks.task: Manage classroom behavior and learning climate
key_tasks.note: Embodied + relationship work; AI cannot do this.

key_tasks.task: Communicate with parents about student progress
Adapt instruction for diverse learners and accommodations
key_tasks.note: Live judgment about what's working with which kid.

key_tasks.task: Maintain student records and report cards

evidence_ledger.meta: US Dept. of Labor · Updated Jan 2026
evidence_ledger.contribution: Task list overwhelmingly relationship + classroom-management work.
Lists relationship-heavy education roles among low-displacement categories.
Projects ~1% growth; teacher shortages persist in many states.
K-12 teaching exposure is among the lowest white-collar scores due to relationship + embodied work.
Education is a top usage category — teachers using AI to lesson-plan, not being replaced by it.

reasoning_steps.title: Score the eight dimensions
reasoning_steps.body: routine_cognitive=5, ai_capability_gap=3, creative_judgment=6, regulatory_moat=7, embodied_work=8, stakes_of_error=7, relationships=9, physical_dexterity=3.

reasoning_steps.title: Calibration check
reasoning_steps.body: Anchor table lists ECE / Kindergarten Teacher at 18. Computed 36 is 18 above. The anchor is correct — relationship-heavy teaching is more resilient than the dimension math suggests because no district will replace a classroom teacher with software. Soften strongly to 18.

reasoning_steps.title: Confidence band
reasoning_steps.body: High ±6 — labor market structure (licensure + parents wanting humans) is unlikely to change quickly.

adjacent_careers.name: Special Education Teacher
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Same moats plus chronic shortage means high job security.

adjacent_careers.name: Speech-Language Pathologist
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Licensed therapy work in schools or clinics; very low exposure.

adjacent_careers.name: Instructional Designer / EdTech
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Higher exposure but lets you build the AI tools instead of being replaced by them.

adjacent_careers.name: Athletic Coach
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Embodied + relationship work; low-pay but durable adjacent path.

action_plan.title: Tutor or peer-mentor this year
action_plan.description: The most direct way to test if you actually like teaching before committing to an Education degree.

action_plan.title: Look at programs that pair a content major with an Education minor
action_plan.description: Single-subject teachers (math, physics, computer science) are in shortest supply and have the best job markets.

action_plan.title: Volunteer in a classroom or summer camp
action_plan.description: Application portfolios for Education programs reward sustained classroom exposure.

action_plan.title: Take a public-speaking elective
action_plan.description: Classroom management is performance under pressure; the skill compounds in any career.

follow_up_suggestions.label: Is teaching pay enough to live on?
